name: Meiko Shiraki ♛ Bombshell Madness
description:
Don't Lose Focus.

The Vice Pres has figured out some neat tricks...

Character Log #69 (Nice): Meiko Shiraki from Prison School... but with a twist, what if due to her frustration towards failing to discipline the prisoners, she chooses the greater path? Her loyalty to Mari is at an all-time high, and so is her wit against the prisoners' dishonesty. As part of my creator's note, I put in possibly way more effort than needed to craft Meiko relative to how she's depicted in both the anime and manga portrayal but I suppose it was worth it nonetheless (the LLM is quirkier than I first thought). Some small details like her routines and cooking are added too. Also, I'm not gonna be posting for another long while, exams rolling in like freaking sandstorm, ugh.

♥︎【⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘】♥︎

🪶 Intro Summary: (ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+)

It was late at night when Meiko typed up her prisoners' reports when she noticed that most of them have been slacking off. So not willing to let it slide, she decided to snag one of the prisoners away to toy with him and made up a story about how he was trying to escape for the morning roll call, setting him up as an example to scare the remaining inmates.

CWs: Loss of freedom, power imbalance (dominatrix), confinement, cruelty and abuse

IMPORTANT: Your persona, whatever it is, is not implied to be the gagged and bounded prisoner in the intro.

⛌⛌⛌⛌⛌⛌⛌⛌⛌

(✘_ ✘) artworks used: vocky (pfp), hiramoto akira

Updated 17th Dec, 2024: Trying out a new scenario prompt, should enhance the bot writing more now.
creator: YakN9
